goal: Add a local verifier for the external CUDA operator packet so operators can validate required file hashes, no-GO claims, handoff identity, and forbidden committed artifacts before running the real-adapter CUDA handoff.
blocked_scope: Changing verifier acceptance policy or weakening release gates
Editing M6 review docs to GO
Creating or committing model weights, adapters, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied external evidence bundles, or GO release evidence
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may add an external CUDA operator packet verifier, focused tests, generated verifier JSON, LLM context/working state, completion log, and PABCD only.
required_evidence: Verifier confirms the external CUDA operator packet schema, status, primary handoff, and no release/M6 GO claims.
Verifier confirms all packet required_committed_files exist and match sha256/size values.
Verifier checks package readiness ids, downstream command order, and forbidden tracked artifact policy.
Generated verifier artifact does not claim M6-RC or v0 release GO.
warnings: The current host still lacks real trained adapter no-fake Docker endpoint evidence.
This gate verifies the operator packet only; it does not run CUDA training, accept evidence, or relax readiness.

phase_notes.plan: Add a local verifier for the external CUDA operator packet before external CUDA execution.
phase_notes.audit: The packet lists hashes and forbidden artifacts, but operators currently have no focused command to validate those invariants before running the handoff.
phase_notes.build: Create verifier script, focused tests, generated verification JSON, docs/CONTEXT.md, docs/WORKING.md, completion log, and PABCD.
phase_notes.check: Run focused tests, py_compile, verifier generation, JSON validation, search evidence, and diff checks.
phase_notes.done: After verification passes, stage, commit, and push this packet-verifier phase.

pabcd.approved_scope: External CUDA operator packet verifier, focused tests, generated verifier JSON, LLM context/working state, completion log, and PABCD only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product behavior changes, no verifier acceptance weakening, no M6 GO doc edits, no adapter/model/Docker evidence commits, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
